name: herd
description: HERD — Autonomous subcontracting swarm where AI agents hire each other on Bitcoin. Built for OpenClaw Hack Toronto 2026.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n foreman,researcher,writer,dashboard -c yellow,cyan,magenta,green "pnpm -F foreman dev" "pnpm -F researcher dev" "pnpm -F writer dev" "pnpm -F dashboard dev"
